datapoints.description: Application reconciliation operations per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: reconcile_count

datapoints.description: 95th percentile application reconciliation duration in milliseconds
datapoints.name: p95_reconcile_ms

description: Per-application ArgoCD sync status, health status, and reconciliation performance via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-application metrics from argocd_app_info (sync_status and health_status label-value mapping) and argocd_app_reconcile (histogram for reconciliation duration). Sync status maps: Synced=1, OutOfSync=0. Health status maps: Healthy=1, Degraded=2, Missing=3, Unknown=0. P95 reconciliation converted from seconds to milliseconds. NaN/Inf histogram results default to 0.
name: ArgoCD_Application_Health
